title: taraxacum multiseriale
intro: Taraxacum multiseriale, also known as the multiflora dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. The multiflora dandelion has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting liver and kidney function. Taraxacum multiseriale can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
